Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Quick Attack", "cost": ["Grass"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "10+", "text": "Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.
FlavorText: Small hooks on the bottom of its feet catch on walls and ceilings. That is how it can hang from above.
It searches about for clean water. If it does not drink water for too long, the leaf on its head wilts.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Ember", "cost": ["Fire"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "20", "text": "Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.
FlavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Lunge", "cost": ["Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "20", "text": "Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
FlavorText: It appears in large numbers by seashores. At night, its central core flashes with a red light.
To alert it, the fin on its head senses the flow of water. It has the strength to heft boulders.

FlavorText: It raises its tail to check its surroundings. The tail is sometimes struck by lightning in this pose.

FlavorText: It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Take Down", "cost": ["Fighting", "Fighting"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "40", "text": "This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself."}]
Attack_Texts: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.
FlavorText: It is inept at turning because of its four short legs. It can only charge and run in one direction.
It eats just one berry a day. By enduring hunger, its spirit is tempered and made sharper.
The tip of its tail is filled with oil that is lighter than water, so it acts as a float.

Attack_Texts: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.|
FlavorText: A Pokémon with abundant curiosity. It shows an interest in everything, so it always zigzags.
